creator: decui@microsoft.com
text:
(In reply to Wei Hu from comment #31)
It would be great to not hardcode the MMIO base/length, since the exact base/length can change if the user runs the Powershell command "Set-VM -LowMemoryMappedIoSpace ..." (see https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/virtualization/hyper-v/deploy/deploying-graphics-devices-using-dda). :-)
